name: Elkins City Park
description: Come play pickleball at Elkins City Park in Elkins, WV! There are 6 asphalt and hard courts. 3 are outdoors and 3 are indoors. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Players have access to restrooms and water. The courts are free.

name: Elkins Randolph County YMCA
description: Elkins Randolph County YMCA is a place to play pickleball in Elkins, WV. There are 2 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts can be reserved. A membership is required to play. The facility includes amenities like restrooms, water, and lights.

name: Phil Gainer Community Center
description: Come play pickleball at Phil Gainer Community Center in Elkins, WV! There are 2 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A one-time fee is required to play. You can reserve the courts.
